verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They rush on the city, They run on the wall Great is the army that carries out His Word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Lord utters His voice before His army The Lord utters His voice before His army

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Blow the trumpet in Zion, Zion Sound the alarm in my holy mountain Blow the trumpet in Zion, Zion Sound the alarm
